title: Diplazium mauianum
taxonomy: Diplazium mauianum is classified as a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is native to Hawaii and is a relatively small species of fern that grows in moist environments. It is a member of the genus Diplazium, which is characterized by its large, simple leaves and distinct fertile fronds. The classification of Diplazium mauianum places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. Further classification places it within the order Polypodiales, and the family Athyriaceae is a part of this order.
